title: Zenith Client
description: A utility mod, specialized for PVP
body:
# Zenith Client
A sleek, lightweight Minecraft client mod for Fabric 1.21+.
Zenith replaces the default Minecraft main menu with a fully custom dark UI and brings a suite of quality-of-life features accessible anywhere in-game with a single keybind.

## Features
### Main Menu

Custom dark main menu with orange grid aesthetic
Styled buttons for Singleplayer, Multiplayer, Settings, and Quit

### In-Game Overlay (toggle with Right Shift)

Fullbright — removes darkness, no gamma tweaking needed

AutoSprint — automatically sprints without holding the key

Coordinates — displays your X Y Z position on the HUD

FPS Display — live frames per second counter

Armor HUD — shows your equipped armor next to the hotbar with durability bars

Ping Display — shows your current server ping in milliseconds

### Settings

All module states save automatically to a config file
Accessible from anywhere — main menu, singleplayer, or multiplayer

_Zenith is in **early alpha** — more modules and features coming soon._
